title: cordylanthus viscidus
intro: Cordylanthus viscidus, also known as sticky bird's beak, is a perennial plant species in the plantain family native to western North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Cordylanthus viscidus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as relief from menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Cordylanthus viscidus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and it can also be used topically as a poultice to soothe skin irritations.
